01 —

About Me

I'm Filip Eremita — a Meta Ads Specialist, AI Creative Producer, and professional photographer based in Reica ob Savinji, Slovenia.

Since 2020 I've been running paid advertising at 2Digit d.o.o. — independently developing campaigns across 13 countries, managing large budgets, creating copy, images, and video creatives, and optimising toward real purchase outcomes. Before that: 9 years running my own photography business and 9 years as a print-shop manager — which means my visual instincts are built on real production experience, not theory.

I work AI-first: Sora, Veo3, Gemini, Firefly, Canva AI, CapCut. Not as novelty — as production tools that let me move faster and test more angles per brief. I write short copy in Slovenian, English, and adapt across markets.

🇸🇮 Slovenian — Native
🇬🇧 English — C2 Proficient
🇩🇪 German — A2

Work History

Nov 2020 — Present
4+ yrs
● Current
Online Advertiser / Meta Ads Specialist
2Digit d.o.o. · Full-time · Mengeš, Slovenia
  • Developing and implementing Meta/Facebook Ads strategies across 13 countries.
  • Independently creating ad copy, image, and video creatives for performance campaigns.
  • Optimising campaigns for sales conversions while managing large advertising budgets.
  • Testing and adapting creative solutions using AI tools: Sora, Veo3, Gemini, Firefly, CapCut, Canva.
  • Monitoring KPIs, reporting results, and adjusting strategies based on performance data.
Jan 2015 — Present
10+ yrs
Professional Photographer
Eremita's s.p. · Self-employed · Reica ob Savinji
  • Nature, commercial, and wedding photography — full production from shoot to export.
  • Client advising on photography style, setup, and post-production.
  • Advanced retouching in Photoshop and Lightroom; product photography specialist.
Dec 2011 — May 2020
8.5 yrs
Print Shop Manager → Graphic Technician
MVM servis d.o.o. · Mozirje, Slovenia
  • Managed and coordinated all print-house operations — scheduling, quality control, client communication.
  • Advanced use of Photoshop, Illustrator and graphic design software for client projects.
  • Built websites using WordPress; ensured technical accuracy across all print deliverables.

Why Me

01
Dinetix requirement
1+ year in performance creative production
4+ years at 2Digit — real budgets, real campaigns, 13 countries. Not a course graduate; a working specialist with live results to show.
02
Dinetix requirement
AI-first, not just Canva with an AI button
I use Sora, Veo3, Gemini, Firefly, and Canva AI as serious production tools. I understand the difference between generating and producing.
03
Dinetix requirement
Understand ads, not just design
131,000+ purchases across 8 winner creatives. Average CTR 3.04% against an industry average of ~0.9%. The numbers speak.
04
Dinetix requirement
Copy in Slovenian & English
Native Slovenian. English at C2 (proficient). Writing punchy hooks and CTAs in both languages is part of my daily workflow at 2Digit.
05
Dinetix requirement
Available 8:00–15:00 CET via Teams
Slovenian (CET). Microsoft Teams is my daily communication tool. Fully available in the required window, async or sync.
06
Dinetix requirement
Reliable, on-time, self-driven
35+ years as a volunteer firefighter. Showing up and delivering on time isn't a work habit — it's a character trait.
